title: Edit Triggers: Menu
text: Edit Triggers: Menu Use the Trigger Editor to define menu-level triggers. trigger preDisplay Option: Copy Description and Comments How to Use the Trigger Editor to navigate and edit ProcScript in the triggers of menus and panels. To start the Trigger Editor, click Triggers in the Menu or Panel Library editor. To navigate or select other menus, return to the Menu editor. To tag triggers that you want to find easily, select the trigger and click Mark . Panes The Trigger Editor consists of the following resizable panes: Structure —view and navigate the hierarchical structure of the current menu Triggers —view and navigate the triggers available to the current object. The icon beside each trigger indicates whether the trigger contains content or is inherited. Trigger Editor for Menus —view and edit ProcScript in the current trigger. Tags —view and navigate to tagged triggers that match search criteria (when you use Find ) or contain errors (after a syntax check). Toolbar Items in the toolbar are also available in the File , Edit , and View menus. Search: Column Item Button/Shortcut Description Filter results... 25 rows found Table 1. Toolbar Item Button/Shortcut Description Filter 25 rows found Filter 25 rows found Filter 25 rows found Item Button/Shortcut Description New component Create a new component. Open component Select and open an existing component. Save component Save the current component. Add tag Add a manual tag to a trigger. Check modified triggers Check syntax of modified triggers. Check all triggers Check syntax of all triggers. Undo Ctrl + Z Undo the most recent action, up to a maximum of 16 actions. Note: It is not possible to undo typing that is immediately followed by a carriage return. Undo moves the cursor to the place affected by the action. The ProcScript may shift slightly when this happens. Redo Ctrl + Y Redo the most recently undone action. You cannot undo an action that has been redone. Cut Ctrl + X Cut the currently selected item. Copy Ctrl + C Copy the currently selected item. Paste Ctrl + V Paste the previously cut or copied item. Replace spaces Replace spaces by tabs in the selected text. Replace tabs Replace tabs by spaces in the selected text. Increase Indent Increase the indent of the selected text. Decrease Indent Decrease the indent of the selected text. Convert to Uppercase Convert the selected text to uppercase. Convert to Lowercase Convert the selected text to lowercase. Format ProcScript Format the ProcScript, adding indentation for readability. Convert to Comments Convert the selected ProcScript to comments. Convert to ProcScript Convert the selected comments to ProcScript code. Find Search the current trigger for a string. Find Next Find the next occurrence of the search string. Find and Replace Find a search string and replace it with another string. Find ProcScript in Component Search the modeled objects or component for a string. Quick Zoom Open the trigger in a separate window for editing. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
